title: Thanksgiving Symbols & Emojis: Copy & Paste 🦃 🍂 Harvest Festive
meta_description: Thanksgiving symbols and emojis — turkeys, autumn leaves, pies, and gratitude combos for November posts and bios. Click any harvest symbol to copy it fast.
hero_tagline: Turkeys, autumn leaves, pies, and gratitude combos for November. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Thanksgiving symbols carry the whole holiday in a few characters — the 🦃 turkey, a drift of 🍂 fallen leaves, a slice of 🥧 pie. This page collects the Thanksgiving emoji and harvest Unicode characters people copy for dinner invitations, gratitude posts, family group chats, and November captions, along with one-click Happy Thanksgiving greeting combos.

sections.label: The Feast
sections.intro: Everything on the table — turkey, sides, pie, and the place setting.

sections.label: Autumn
sections.intro: Falling leaves and golden fields for classic fall aesthetics.

sections.label: Harvest
sections.intro: Pumpkins, orchard fruit, and farm imagery for harvest-season posts.

sections.label: Gratitude
sections.intro: Warm-toned hearts and thankful gestures for what the day is really about.

sections.label: Festive Combos
sections.intro: Ready-made harvest greetings and decorations — each button copies the entire combo in one click.
